steps.assistant_text: strtol-lite (0x-hex else signed decimal), 92 insns. BOUNDARY FIX: 67E58 was a mis-split FRAGMENT of 67D8C (67D8C branches jump into it; it reads caller-set v0/v1 — the old 'caller-set $v1 inexpressible' cap note was the tell; zero external callers). Merged the .s (0xCC->0x170), deleted 67E58. Char-scanner kit: (1) cursor idiom p=str; str++; c=*p (increment between copy and load defeats lbu-offset fold + load-PRE); (2) range tests on repeated *p (CSE $a2) with ONE named c var ($a3); (3) '-'/'.' /10 as named int locals win beq rs slots + color t0/t1/t2 (literal *10 strength-reduces vs multu); (4) goto-loop with early if(minus==c){sign=1;goto dec;} reproduces bnel + orphaned dead lbu dup.

metadata.verification: 92/92 word-exact (real path, post-merge .s) + make ROM byte-identical
